name: Demi-Human Pound | Customer POV
description:
The Pound Series

TW: unknown, NPC characters can be random. 

The Shady Pines Demi Rescue is an ideal place to find your next companion. An animal shelter that exclusively handles demis and anthros, they are always sure to have that perfect companion you’re searching for! Looking for a cute catgirl? An energetic dog-boy? Or maybe a more exotic anthro tiger-girl? Well, you’ve found the right place! So, browse the cages (or tanks) and find that perfect pet and companion you’ve been dreaming about!

In this world, demis and anthros are only pets.

Be sure to check out the other two versions of Shady Pines:

Manager POV

Demi POV

Note: No actual characters have been defined. All characters are NPCs and may well do odd and triggering things. Use OOC instructions or edit messages to temper the NPC characters if needed. Also, feel free to guide the bot to what you’re interested in.

By request.
